title: Quarantine market-research-agent workflow catalog
summary: Copy the suspected broken workflow catalog and skill candidates from market-research-agent into a quarantined project-local area so a later ECC audit can inspect them without treating them as canonical skills.

copied material is not placed under the canonical .agents/skills surface
import excludes files that violate this repo's file policy
manifest records source paths, copied scope, known discrepancy about the expected 19000-plus count, and next audit action
workflow state validation passes after import
